positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the application's dashboard or home page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected away from the login page
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Verify the user's account/profile information is visible or a welcome message is shown
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: All login page UI elements are rendered correctly, accessible, and functional
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page title or heading is displayed (e.g., 'Login' or 'Sign In')
Verify the email/username input field is visible and enabled
Verify the password input field is visible and enabled
Verify the password field masks input characters
Verify the 'Login' / 'Submit' button is visible and clickable
Verify any 'Forgot Password' or 'Register' links are present if applicable
Verify the page layout is properly rendered without broken elements
positive_scenarios.title: Login page UI elements are fully rendered and accessible

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session is maintained after a page refresh and the user remains authenticated
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser refresh button)
Verify the user remains logged in and is not redirected back to the login page
Verify the dashboard or home page content is still displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and session persistence on page refresh

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login is successful as email fields are typically case-insensitive; user is redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'TESTD1051@GMAIL.COM' (uppercase version of the valid email) in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is successfully authenticated
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with email address containing uppercase letters

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged out, session is terminated, and the login page is displayed upon subsequent navigation
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Locate and click the 'Logout' / 'Sign Out' button or link (e.g., from a user menu or navbar)
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Verify that attempting to navigate back to the dashboard redirects to the login page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout after login

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login form is submitted via the Enter key and the user is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Press the 'Enter' key on the keyboard instead of clicking the Login button
Verify the login form is submitted
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
positive_scenarios.title: Login with valid credentials using keyboard Enter key submission

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Validation errors are displayed indicating that both username and password fields are required; form is not submitted
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the email/username field blank
Leave the password field blank
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify appropriate validation error messages are displayed (e.g., 'Email is required', 'Password is required')
Verify the user remains on the login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password fields

negative_scenarios.expected_result: An authentication error message is displayed and the user is not granted access to the application
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the login request is processed
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials', 'Incorrect password', or 'Username or password is incorrect')
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify the password field is cleared or the user is prompted to re-enter the password
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: An appropriate error message is displayed indicating the account does not exist or credentials are invalid; user is not logged in
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'nonexistentuser99999@fakeemail.com' in the email/username field
Enter any password (e.g., 'Password@123') in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the login request is processed
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g., 'User not found', 'Invalid credentials', or 'No account associated with this email')
Verify the user remains on the login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid/non-existent email address

negative_scenarios.expected_result: A validation error is shown for the missing email/username field and the login is not processed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the email/username field blank
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify a validation error message is displayed for the email/username field (e.g., 'Email is required' or 'Please enter your email')
Verify the user remains on the login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and valid password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: A validation error is shown for the missing password field and the login is not processed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Leave the password field blank
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify a validation error message is displayed for the password field (e.g., 'Password is required' or 'Please enter your password')
Verify the user remains on the login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: A format validation error is displayed indicating the email address is invalid; the login request is not submitted
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'invalidemail@@notvalid..com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the form is not submitted or the request is rejected
Verify an email format validation error is displayed (e.g., 'Please enter a valid email address')
Verify the user remains on the login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with malformed / invalid email format

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application safely handles the SQL injection attempt, displays an error message, and does not allow unauthorized access or expose sensitive error details
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter ''' OR '1'='1' --' in the email/username field
Enter any value (e.g., 'password') in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the application does not grant unauthorized access
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials' or 'Invalid email format')
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify no database errors or stack traces are exposed to the user
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection string in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: The application gracefully handles oversized input, displays a relevant error or validation message, and does not crash or expose server errors
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a string of 300 characters as the email (e.g., 'aaaaaa...aaaa@test.com') in the email/username field
Enter a string of 300 characters as the password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Submit' button
Verify the application handles the input gracefully
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials' or a field length validation error)
Verify the application does not crash or return an unhandled server error
Verify the user remains on the login page
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with excessively long email and password values (boundary test)
